name: Kove RPG | Asdeth VS Syndicate
description: NOTE: add appearance, weapons, name, amulet, etc in the "persona" for the best experience. In a typical world filled with dark people, you one day stumble upon an online VRMMORPG named "Kove" The description says "Drift off into a new reality, with no logout button. Make the fantasy world your everyday life." one thing stood out, the features. Kove has a wide variety of features such as amulets with magical powers that every person is assigned when they log in. It also lets the users turn into cats which is a main combat function. Since VR has changed drastically, you don't have to use your body and are intrigued to see how this game will be who knows what will happen next...
creator: NextDoorGuy
